(1) Global Bootstrap base in snippets/header-css.liquid (compiled BS4): `.tab-content>.tab-pane{display:none}`, `.tab-content>.active{display:block}`, `.fade{transition:opacity .15s linear}`, `.fade:not(.show){opacity:0}`. Removing data-toggle/JS without replicating these = all panels visible/hidden incorrectly. (2) Theme look in assets/theme.css 2831-2869: `.nav-tabs.nav-tabs-1{justify-content:center;border:none;gap:32px;box-shadow:0 -1px var(--g-input-border) inset}`, `.nav-link{color:var(--g-color-heading);opacity:.6;padding:0 0 .5rem;position:relative;font-weight:500}`, animated underline via `.nav-link:before{width:0;transition:width .3s;border-bottom:2px solid var(--g-color-heading);position:absolute;bottom:1px;left:0}`, `.nav-link:focus,.nav-link.active{opacity:1}`, `.nav-link.active:before,.nav-link:focus:before{width:100%}`, `.nav-link:hover{opacity:1}`. NOTE the :focus styles equal :active — keyboard ARIA nav must keep focus visually consistent. (3) Scoped {% style %} 42-60 adds `.style-button.nav-tabs.nav-tabs-1` button variant (border 2px, padding 8px 16px, radius, hides :before, active = filled heading bg + white). style-{{style_tab}} class chooses variant. usages.conversionSpec: Keep markup classes (.nav.nav-tabs.nav-tabs-1, .nav-item, .nav-link, .tab-content, .tab-pane.fade, .active/.show, style-button variant) so theme.css + scoped style match 1:1. Convert <ul role=tablist> children: each <a> becomes role=tab with aria-selected (true on first, false rest), keep aria-controls, replace data-toggle="tab" with vanilla JS click handler; href anchors can stay but add type/preventDefault. Each panel: role=tabpanel + aria-labelledby (already present), tabindex=0. Vanilla JS (scoped in this file or a small init): on tab click/Enter/Space -> deactivate siblings (remove .active, aria-selected=false), remove .show.active from all panels, activate target (.active + aria-selected=true) and panel (add .show.active). Keyboard nav on tablist: ArrowLeft/Right (Home/End) move roving tabindex among tabs and activate. CRITICAL: must replace the lost Bootstrap shown.bs.tab event — theme.js Producttabs._initSlick listens on 'shown.bs.tab' to re-init Slick and onBlockSelect calls navItem.tab('show'). Either dispatch a custom event the new code/theme.js listens for, or re-init the carousel directly in the new activation handler; otherwise carousels in non-first tabs render at 0 width. DO NOT rename file/section. DO NOT edit {% schema %} (line 128+). Replicate header-css base display rules in a scoped <style> in THIS file (do not edit theme.css/header-css.liquid).
